LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT YVETTE KING'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE DEFENDANT HAS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE SHERIFF IS NOT HOLDING ANY FUNDS AT THIS TIME AND THAT THERE IS NOT ENOUGH FUNDS IN THE BANK. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Yvette King, defendant/claimant, appearing on her own behalf.
No other appearance.

The matter was discussed. After hearing, the court ruled as follows: Defendant Yvette King's Claim Of Exemption is ordered off calendar. The defendant has represented to the court that the sheriff is not holding any funds at this time and that there is not enough funds in the bank. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
